title: Barely Default Invisible Item Frames
description: In addon for the Barely Default resource pack that removes item frames. This works great in combination with Mickey Joe's CIT variants like the custom torches
body:
Plain and simple.

Add this small addon pack on top of [Mickey Joe's "Barely Default"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default/) to remove the model of all item frames in your world. Regular and glowing ones.

Other 'invisible item frame' packs won't be compatible with Barely Default.

This pack also maintains the custom item model textures from Barely Default.

Obviously only for the **items**, as the **block model is entirely removed**.
Which boosts FPS significantly! But the main purpose of this pack is to level up the Custom Torch (Sconce) experience of Barely Default!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FRA9wpf8ZFs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
